assertions.description: INCORRECT: U1 has lib_id 'Connector_Generic:Conn_02x16_Counter_Clockwise' (a generic connector symbol used as MCU placeholder) but value='MCU'. The analyzer classifies it as type 'ic' because the value contains 'MCU', overriding the lib_id-based classification. This results in component_types reporting 1 IC and only 2 connectors when there are actually 3 connectors (J1, J2, and U1). The USB detection (USB_D+/USB_D- nets) and crystal circuit detection still work correctly because they rely on net names rather than component type.
